name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_pcas_numeric_data
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_pcas_numeric_data' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Start Chng` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Survey Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifieduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Static_1km_Start` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Start Chng` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Survey Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifieduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Static_1km_Start` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Start Chng|Survey Date|deltautc|modifiedutc|modifieduser|Static_1km_Start' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_pcas_numeric_data`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_pcas_numeric_data' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
